value.PublicRemarks: Impeccable Home with Expansive Lake View in Sarasota National This gorgeous 3 Bedroom/2 Bath 2nd Floor condominium is all about location, location, location! An impeccable residence with a casual but luxurious feel, and a spectacular expansive lake view with the golf course and the preserve just beyond.  This home away from home sits inside Sarasota National, a premier Golf Community in the heart of Venice, Florida with an abundance of amenities including a 7,000 sq.ft. fitness center, 18 holes of premium golfing, tennis, pickle ball, resort style swimming pools and Tiki Bar! This home absolutely has the best view in the community, and you will never be short of exciting things to do! Come enjoy an exceptional Florida lifestyle in this open split bedroom floor plan, designed for versatile living. The open living concept is light and bright and has beautiful designer details to include tile back splash, exquisite granite, beautiful tile flooring, wood cabinets, stainless steel appliance package, decorative recessed lighting, high impact glass sliders and windows, & beautiful ceiling fans throughout. Walk in to an open living area which boasts a comfortable sectional couch & a large flat-screen tv to enjoy your favorite movie.  The wooden dining room table seats four or enjoy a quick meal on the barstools at the kitchen counter.  The master suite is sure to please with a spacious king size bed, flat-screen tv and a huge walk-in closet designed by California Closets. The master bath has a large vanity with enormous drawers, cabinet storage, dual sinks, and a beautifully tiled walk-in shower.  There's room for everyone with 2 additional bedrooms which include queen size beds, and a guest bathroom with tub/shower.  The bedrooms have upgraded carpeting and the lovely den showcases wood flooring.  The laundry room includes a washer/dryer with cabinets, and the property includes a 2 Car Garage. Step out onto your covered balcony and bask in the warm sunlight and the picturesque views of the lake, while sipping on your morning coffee.  There is plenty of room to stretch out and soak in the beauty of this highly rated & guard gated resort-style community. Enjoy the gas grill provided for your BBQ's. It is the guest's responsibility to clean and maintain the grill and replenish propane as required. Enjoy a round of golf at the club's championship 18-hole course or visit the Palm Club, a 32,000 sq. ft., three-building clubhouse campus, featuring fine dining, tennis, state of the art fitness center, swimming and more with the included membership transfer. With the included golf membership transfer guests are able to play at Sarasota National under the member rates and they are able to select preferred tee times, which is a huge saving for golfers! This alluring oasis awaits your arrival! No pets please.

value.PublicRemarks: This gorgeous estate home in the resort-style gated golf community of Lakewood National is the perfect vacation home for the whole family! This 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom home features a huge travertine lanai, custom outdoor kitchen with built in grill, private pool and spa. This beautiful home lends itself to entertaining and enjoying the Florida lifestyle. Upgrades include vaulted ceilings, granite counter tops, dual sinks, large soaking tub and huge walk in tile shower. Enjoy the stunning view of the 3rd & 4th hole and watch the golfers on the fairway from the Lanai as you swim, enjoy meals and entertain guests on the lanai. The master bedroom features a king size bed, flat screen TV and a en suite bath. Both guest bedrooms contain queen size beds and have easy access guests bathrooms located near by. One of the guests bathrooms provides direct access to the lanai. Perfect for hosting in the summertime! The community of Lakewood National features a grand clubhouse, state of the art fitness facility, resort style lagoon pool, pool side café, full service spa, tennis courts, and so much more! The community is fully gated with security guards present. Lakewood National also offers an 18-hole golf course designed by Arnold Palmer. The location is superb with only a 5-minute drive to downtown Lakewood Ranch, 20 minutes to downtown Sarasota and 40 minutes from Tampa. Not to mention that Lakewood National is only a short distance to the finest beaches, restaurants, and shopping centers in the area. You’ll love everything about this community. As of January 1st 2019, the association of Lakewood National will requires all renters to purchase the membership transfer. The fee for the membership will be factored into the total price. This will give you access to the all the fun the community has to offer! Pool heating is optional, for an additional fee. Let Us Help You Plan Your Bradenton and Sarasota Vacation Let the team at Gulf Coast Vacation Rentals help you plan the perfect Florida vacation with Bradenton as your home base. You are surrounded by the best Florida offers, including Sarasota, the Gulf beaches and our beautiful Manatee River. During your vacation, be sure to include Bradenton Beach and the downtown River Walk next to the marina, as well as the Village Arts, and many restaurants and shopping opportunities.

value.PublicRemarks: Stop looking you just found your own ISLAND oasis... Harbour Isle is a beautiful gated community with the award winning $4.2M Beach club directly on the intracoastal. Guests who book 30 days or more can enjoy access to all the impeccable amenities Harbour Isle has to offer. With a 4200 sq. ft fitness center, sky bar, restaurant, activities, kayaking, outside bar area and a heated resort size pool and spa directly on the water. There is even a beach area to enjoy the views of the water and outstanding sunsets. There are three additional heated pools, parks, and bike and walking trails throughout the community. Guests who book shorter than 30 days have access to the heated pool outside of the unit, as well as the grill's! Located off of Anna Maria Island right before the Manatee Bridge, these homes are located less than a mile away from Manatee Beach. Enjoy the island life while staying in this home. You’ll have countless restaurants and attractions to choose from, anywhere from water rentals, fresh seafood restaurants, and local shops, not to mention the friendly people that live there, and the beautiful beaches. This exquisite floor plan features 3 bedrooms, 3 baths, and a screened balcony. Chefs will love the well-appointed kitchen with top of the line stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, premium cabinetry and large center island which opens to the bright and airy living room. The living room features a cozy sectional sofa, recliner and beautiful HD TV. To the left of the kitchen, you will see a full dining room set for 6. Moving into the master bedroom, you'll have a king-size bed, HD TV and an en suite bathroom with a walk-in closet. One guest bedroom features a queen-size bed, HD TV and en suite bathroom with a shower/tub combo. The last guest bedroom is equipped with two twin beds and an HD TV; there is a full guest bathroom right down the hall.  Right outside the gates a new Marina with wet and dry slips. Also, Margaritaville is coming to Harbour Isle with restaurants, entertainment and shops. If you’re looking for a true waterfront community that is private and gated with great amenities only a mile from the beaches of Anna Maria Island and a mile from the walking and biking trails of Robinson Preserve, then you need to see this outstanding home. Bring your boat and enjoy the lifestyle at Harbour Isle! ***To book in this luxurious community, guest's must be over the age of 26 per HOA guidelines. Let Us Help You Plan Your Bradenton and Sarasota Vacation Let the team at Gulf Coast Vacation Rentals help you plan the perfect Florida vacation with Bradenton as your home base. You are surrounded by the best Florida offers, including Sarasota, the Gulf beaches and our beautiful Manatee River. During your vacation, be sure to include Bradenton Beach and the downtown Riverwalk next to the marina, as well as the Village Arts, and many restaurants and shopping opportunities.

value.PublicRemarks: This home will make you feel as if you are on an island, with access and views of canals just down the road. Located in a quiet neighborhood, with plenty of space for you and your family to enjoy. Grilling is a breeze with an onsite grill available for guests use. Your home away from home has a private heated pool, with an outdoor shower to make your island escape spectacular. When entering this oceanfront styled home, you will find an open floor plan throughout. Accordion style lanai door allows you to have complete openness from the pool to the kitchen giving you that constant reminder that you are in paradise! This pristine home offers 2 bedrooms and 2 full baths and can accommodate four comfortably. The large master suite will become your new sanctuary. Allowing you privacy but also a lovely pocket door leading right out to the beautiful pool. Where you can take an early swim and catch the sunrise or night swim and watch the sunset! Spacious guest bedroom offers two full beds, with a private bathroom attached. Fully equipped kitchen, with a fold-able side table to extend the kitchen space out to the patio. Bring your furry friends along, and let them relax with you. With a beautifully fenced in backyard your furry friend will be able to run and play in paradise! Truly designed for your perfect vacation! Just five minutes away and you will find yourself at the picturesque Edgewater Public Boat Ramp with easy access to the boat slip, you will have no problem enjoying that gorgeous water. Whether you are a boater or fisherman Edgewater has several canals for you to enjoy your outdoor activities! Enjoy golfing at the luxurious Port Charlotte Golf Club only fifteen minutes down the road, where you can play on their immaculate 18 hole course and enjoy private dining at the famous MarTEEni Bar & Grill. Escape to beautiful Englewood Beach, where you can rent kayaks and much more. Close to Murdock Town Center and all of North Port’s charming boutiques you are sure to find constant bliss at your home away from home! Pool heating is optional, for an additional fee. Please contact one of our team members for further details. Family friendly this property provides a play pen that is available for guests use. Please remember to clean the onsite grill before departure! Pets allowed, maximum 2.

value.PublicRemarks: This 2 BR/2BA tropical retreat in wonderful Shorewalk of Bradenton is calling your name. This gorgeous community offers amazing amenities such as 2 heated pools, 2 hot tubs, 2 tennis courts, a clubhouse and a playground area. This condo is ideally located within a few minutes of several restaurants, a cinema, bowling, spa, IMG Academy and major grocery stores. When you’re ready to walk the tranquil, white sandy beaches of Bradenton Beach or Anna Maria Island, they are just a mere 5 miles away. Come lounge on your screened-in outdoor lanai and bask in the sunshine while you enjoy your morning coffee in the morning and enjoy the Gulf breezes by night. As you enter this lovely abode, you will find a spacious open floor plan with comfortable couches, a coffee table, and a beautifully tiled floor where you can convene with friends and family. The cozy décor, provides a relaxing, beachy vibe that will make you forget your cares in no time. The dining area boasts a large table with seating for 4, where everyone can gather together to enjoy a delicious meal. The kitchen offers all of your modern appliances including a stove, microwave, dishwasher, toaster, coffee maker, dinnerware & a refrigerator for your culinary pleasure. The lovely master bedroom features a King-size bed complete with headboard, a dresser & mirror, as well as a flat-screen TV to enjoy your favorite movie. The master bathroom hosts a walk-in shower. The guest bedroom features two adorable twin beds. The guest bathroom includes a tub and shower. This home sleeps up to 4 people. This condo is located in an outstanding neighborhood complete with comfort and convenience. Ideally located in the heart of West Bradenton, you will truly enjoy everything this area has to offer. Nature lovers will delight in nearby Robinson Preserve where walking, biking, kayaking and bird watching are pleasant ways to spend your day. Bradenton Beach is located less than 10 minutes away and Anna Maria Island is only a couple of more minutes up the coast. Your peaceful paradise is awaiting your arrival! Come escape from it all. Sorry no pets, please.

value.PublicRemarks:
Unwind at this enchanting 2 Bedroom, 2 Bath home located in the very popular subdivision of Casa Del Sol, centrally situated in the heart of Bradenton. In need of some outdoor entertainment? This property boasts a large fenced in the back yard for you and your loved ones to enjoy! When walking to the front door of this home, you will notice nothing but an abundance of space flourishing with lush grass and beautiful plants. The large driveway provides plenty of space for parking. Upon entering the home, you will find a lovely open floor plan with a large work desk to the right where you will find working remotely, is a breeze. To the left, you will find the spacious living room that has two large couches, as well as a lovely day chair for you to rest your feet on after a long day of adventure. The open floor plan is a key feature of this home as it allows each room to flow ornately with one another. The kitchen can be seen from either the formal dining room or the living room has the chef's touch! Utilizing the double-sized stainless-steel sink and the gorgeous wood butcher block makes prepping meals a breeze. Off the kitchen, you will find the formal dining room, which can seat four comfortably. The large wooden dining table offers the perfect space for your family to enjoy any meal! When exiting the dining room you are greeted by a hallway leading to the bedrooms. The guest bedroom boasts a queen-size bed, with beautiful coastal designs. A large dresser offers plenty of space for your belongings. Two large chairs sit underneath a large paned window, allowing natural light in all day long. Adjacent to the guest room, you will find the updated bathroom that has a shower and tub combo with a beautifully designed vanity and sinks. Right down the hall, you will find the opulent master bedroom that offers plenty of space for you to enjoy. The queen size bed carries the coastal design, keeping it a light and airy atmosphere. Including two large dressers and a bi-fold closet, you will find plenty of space for your possessions. Adjacent you will find the pristine master bathroom that has a large tiled walk-in shower. The outdoor space is impeccable. Enjoying the screened-in lanai, you will find yourself entangled with the large fenced in backyard with outdoor seating to accommodate four. This space will be the go-to spot for barbecues and family gatherings. It is the guest responsibility to clean and maintain the grill, as well as replenish propane as required. The washer and dryer are located in the garage and available for guest use. Furry friends are welcome, max 2 pets, Please 
 When you’re ready to explore, head out to the nearby white sandy beaches of Lido Key or Longboat Key – the choice is yours. The world-famous St. Armand’s Circle offers endless boutique shopping and dining experiences, or you can enjoy an array of artistic events in Downtown Sarasota, such as the Sarasota Opera.

value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to Turtle House! This stunning 3-bedroom, 2-bath home with a pool is located in the heart of Sarasota. This home has been recently updated and offers a spacious backyard for you to entertain the whole family! Located only 12 minutes from the world-famous Siesta Key Beach and another three minutes away is Siesta Key Village, which is known for its exquisite restaurants and endless activities! Upon entering, you will find an open concept floor plan with plenty of natural light. There are gorgeous vinyl wood floors that run throughout the entire home. The living room has two large leather couches and is the perfect spot to relax after a day by the pool! Adjacent is the giant chef’s kitchen that boasts gorgeous navy cabinets, with a stunning grey quartz countertop. The dining room has a darling chandelier with seating for up to six. Your spacious master suite awaits! This room has a king-size bed, a 42” Smart TV, and private access to the pool area. Attached is the spa-inspired master bath. There is a gorgeous dual vanity, a large walk-in shower, and a free-standing soaking tub that has gorgeous views of the pool and backyard! The second bedroom has a queen-size bed and offers plenty of space to kick back and unwind after a day of adventure. The second bathroom boasts a gorgeous vanity and a large shower/tub combo. The third bedroom has two full-size beds with plenty of space for your personal belongings. Time to head outside! There is a couch that can accommodate up to four comfortably, along with four chaise lounges for you to soak up that Florida sunshine! The large caged-in pool is rectangular shaped and has a gorgeous tile backsplash. In addition, there is an outdoor shower for you to rinse off before heading in/out! Through the screened door, you will find the newly and completely renovated back yard which has been professionally landscaped and includeds, a fire pit surrounded by four Adirondack chairs, a corn hole set, and a hammock for your enjoyment. Just 7 miles from the world-famous St. Armand’s Circle, which offers endless boutique shopping and dining experiences, or you can enjoy an array of artistic events in Downtown Sarasota, such as the Sarasota Opera, the Sarasota Orchestra, ballet, theatre, the infamous Ringling Art Museum, Maria Selby Botanical Gardens, and Marina Jacks for boat tours. If you love outdoor adventures, come get lost amid the labyrinth of mangrove tunnels and explore their unique ecosystem aboard a rented kayak or stand-up paddleboard in South Lido Beach Park, or hike the Northern Nature Trail. This area seamlessly combines the energy and vibe of Downtown Sarasota cosmopolitan life with a seaside paradise that you don't want to miss. One visit to this St. Armand’s and you won't want to leave. House Rule: Not Pets. No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. This home has high speed internet with great WiFi service throughout, making it the perfect place for your workcation! Pool heating is optional, for an additional non-refundable fee of $25 per day + taxes to be paid directly to the management company after the reservation is confirmed.

**Taxes and fees not included.

value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to The Artist's Way! This stunning 2-bedroom, 2-bath second-floor condo is located in the highly sought-after community of Lakewood National, located in Lakewood Ranch FL. This condo is conveniently located near all the shops and restaurants! Lakewood National is an amenity-rich style of living in Lakewood Ranch. The community features a grand clubhouse, state-of-the-art fitness facility, resort-style lagoon pool, poolside café, full-service spa, tennis courts, and so much more! The community is fully gated with security guards present. Lakewood National also offers an 18-hole golf course designed by Arnold Palmer. Upon entering the condo, you will find a light and bright living space! The kitchen has gorgeous granite countertops and stainless-steel appliances. The breakfast table in the kitchen has seating for three. There are three red leather bar stools, next to the gorgeous dining table that can seat up to four comfortably. The living room has a plush “L” shaped couch and offers plenty of space to kick back and unwind after a long day at the beach. There is a set of sliding glass doors leading out to the patio. From the patio, you have expansive views of the lake along with the golf course! There is outdoor seating for six. The master bedroom awaits! This room has a queen-size bed, plenty of dresser space, and a gorgeous view through the window of the lake! Attached is the master bathroom, which has an updated vanity and a large walk-in shower that is tiled from floor to ceiling. The converted den is the perfect space for kids! There is a twin-size bed with a workstation, where you can set up your laptop/tablet. The second bedroom has a queen-size bed and offers plenty of space to relax after a day at the pool. Adjacent is the second bathroom that has an updated vanity with a shower/tub combo. The location is superb with only a 5-minute drive to downtown Lakewood Ranch, offering boutique Main St. shops & restaurants. You are just 20 minutes to downtown Sarasota and 40 minutes from Tampa. You’ll love everything about this amazing community. You are only a short ride away from all of the fantastic things that Sarasota has to offer. Siesta Key Beach, only 20 minutes away, is well-known for its powdery white quartz sand and has been rated the #1 beach in the USA (#5 in the world by Travel Advisor) for several years. Come and see for yourself, this rarely overcrowded beach that is a great find for couples wanting a romantic getaway. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. No Pets.

***Taxes and fees not included.

This marvelous community features a grand Amenity Center, a state-of-the-art fitness facility, a resort-style lagoon pool, poolside café, Tiki Bar, full-service spa, tennis courts, and more! The fully gated community is equipped with security guards. Lakewood National offers a spectacular 36-hole golf course designed by Arnold Palmer himself, to indulge in your ultimate golf fantasy vacation. Upon entering the condo, you will find a bright and airy atmosphere. There is a screened-in outdoor space by the front door, that has an outdoor dining table that can accommodate up to six or more five comfortably. The living room is spacious, with two plush leather couches and a set of sliding glass doors leading out to the patio. Adjacent is the kitchen, which has barstool setting for 3, and all stainless-steel appliances. The first dining table has gorgeous views of the lake and can accommodate up to four six or more comfortably. The patio boasts expansive views of the lake, and has outdoor seating for two. The second dining table can accommodate up to six or more. The master suite awaits! This room has a king-size bed and is the perfect space to unwind after a long day of adventures. The attached master bath boasts a dual vanity and has a large walk-in shower. The second bedroom has a queen-size bed and has plenty of space for your personal belongings. The second bathroom has an updated vanity with a shower/tub combo. The third bedroom has two twin-size beds, with plenty of dresser space. Come, see why people return year after year to this exclusive community. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. Furry friends welcome, max 2 pets, and require a $200 per pet non-refundable pet fee to be paid directly to the management company after the reservation is confirmed. As of January 1st 2019, the association of Lakewood National will require ALL renters to purchase the membership transfer. The fee for the membership will be factored into the total price.

**Taxes and fees not included.

Angelfish is just 1.5 miles from Port Charlotte Beach Park, where you can launch your kayak from or cast a line and catch some fish! Upon entering the home, you will find an open concept floor plan. The spacious living room has two plush sofas. Adjacent is a lovely sitting area with two adjoining day chairs, where you can enjoy your morning cup of coffee. Adjacent is the dining table that can accommodate up six comfortably. The kitchen has gorgeous countertops for you to prepare your family’s favorite treats! The master suite awaits! This bedroom has a king-size bed, and is the perfect spot to relax after a long day at the beach. Attached is the master bathroom that has a dual vanity and a large walk-in shower. The second bedroom has a queen-size bed and plenty of space for personal belongings. The second bathroom has an updated vanity and a gorgeous shower/tub combo. value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to Vitamin Sea! This exquisite 3-bedroom, 3-bath private pool home sits at the end of the cul-de-sac overlooking the stunning canal, with mature landscaping all around the home. This home offers the perfect location to it all! You are just 2.5 miles away from the gorgeous white sands of Bradenton Beach and just 2.8 miles from magnificent Bridge Street, where you will find restaurants and shopping galore. Do not miss the chance to visit the gorgeous and world renowned Anna Maria Island, which is just 5 miles from this home and offers some of the best beaches in the world. Upon entering, you will find a bright and airy atmosphere. The art deco with modern flair makes this home truly remarkable. The living room boasts a large “L” shaped couch along with a stunning decorative fireplace! The beautiful wooden dining table can accommodate up to six comfortably. Adjacent is the bonus room, which has two cozy couches, a foosball table, and a wet bar with two barstools. The best part of the bonus room is the gorgeous views of the pool and the canal! The master suite awaits! This bedroom has a queen-size bed, a lovely day chair and is the perfect spot to relax after a day by the pool. The master bathroom has an updated large walk-in shower that is tile from floor to ceiling, with a detachable showerhead. The second bedroom has two queen-size beds, a fireplace, and plenty of space for your personal belongings. Attached is the second bathroom, which has dual vanities, a large walk-in shower that is tiled from floor to ceiling with a shower bench, and a detachable showerhead. The third bedroom has a queen-size bed and twin bunk beds. The third bathroom has a large soaking tub, with an updated vanity. There are two twin sleeper sofa chairs, available for additional sleeping arrangements and guests. The outdoor oasis awaits! The large square-shaped pool overlooks the gorgeous canal where you can soak up that Florida sunshine all day long. There is an outdoor table with an umbrella that can accommodate up to three. There is also plenty of additional seating including chaise loungers. Enjoy the day casting a line from the boat dock, to try and catch the fish of the day! The boat dock is available for guests. The Boat Lift is not for guest use. There is a printer available at the home for guest to use. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. No Pets. Pool heating is optional, for an additional non-refundable fee of $25 per day plus taxes?to be paid directly to the management company after the reservation is confirmed.

**Taxes and fees not included.

value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to Happy Daze! This lovely 3-bedroom, 2-bath home has a large backyard and is located in the quaint community of Cortez Landings. This home's location is everything. It is located just 20 minutes from the illustrious Bradenton Beach, close to exquisite restaurants, shopping, the Ringling Museum, theaters, Botanical Gardens, and local Parks. It is 20 minutes to Sarasota and 40 minutes to St. Petersburg and Tampa. Upon entering the home, you will find yourself lost in paradise with the silence and beauty of Cortez Landings. The living room offers an open concept floor plan and has two large plush couches. Adjacent, you will find a charming desk where you can set up your home away from home office. The modern and sleek dining table can accommodate up to six people comfortably. The large kitchen, has granite countertops, a Keurig coffee maker, and four barstools. The master bedroom has a queen-size bed and is the perfect spot to relax after a long day of adventures! Attached is the master bathroom that has a large vanity, a walk-in closet, a shower/tub combo with a detachable showerhead. The second bedroom has a full-size bed, with a large closet for your personal belongings. The second bathroom has an updated vanity with a shower/tub combo with a detachable showerhead. The third bedroom has a full-size bed and a 32” Smart TV for you to enjoy after a day at the beach. Through the sliding glass doors off of the living room, you will find the spacious backyard where you can enjoy entertaining with your family and loved ones. Come, make memories with your loved ones that will last you a lifetime. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. Furry friends welcome, max 2 pets, and require a $200 per pet non-refundable pet fee to be paid directly to the management company after the reservation is confirmed. You will enjoy easy access to shopping, restaurants, downtown Sarasota and Bradenton, and the miles of award-winning tranquil white sandy beaches. Anna Maria Island and Bradenton Beach are small towns known for their fishing piers, sugar-sand beaches, and quaint strips of shops, restaurants, and other family-owned businesses, where pace noticeably slows in this Gulf retreat. Nature lovers will delight in nearby Robinson Preserve where walking, biking, kayaking, and bird watching are pleasant ways to spend your day.

***Taxes and fees not included.

This home is conveniently located just ten minutes from the famous Ellenton Premium Outlet Malls, and just a short drive to all of the Gulf Coast beaches. This home is located in Lorraine Lakes, a newly developed gated community within Lakewood Ranch, Florida. Your adventures and boundless. Location is everything; this home is only a short distance from everyday conveniences such as shopping, restaurants, recreation centers, and the crystal-clear beaches Florida offers. Check out the surrounding resort-style Golf Courses! There are several in Lakewood Ranch; the most desirable to golfers is Esplanade, 4 minutes from the house, and River Strand, 14 minutes from the house! This estate home has a large paved driveway and pathway to the front door. Upon entering the house, you will find an open concept floor plan. The spacious living room has three plush couches for you to kick back and relax after a day by the pool, along with a Smart TV. You will find chic décor throughout this entire home. Adjacent is the office, where you can set up your remote office and have the perfect workcation. There is also a futon in the office. The chef’s kitchen has it all, fully stocked with a giant island with four barstools and all stainless-steel appliances. Adjacent is the dining room. This stunning table has views of the lake and can accommodate up to six comfortably. The primary bedroom is located off of the living room. This spacious room has a king-size bed, a Smart TV, and a set of sliding glass doors to the backyard with plenty of space for you to unwind after a day of adventure. The primary bathroom has a large walk-in closet, dual vanities, and an enormous walk-in shower with a detachable showerhead. The second bedroom has two twin-size beds with plenty of closet space for your personal belongings. The second bathroom has an updated vanity with a shower/tub combo. Down the hall is the third bedroom with a queen-size bed and a walk-in closet. Attached is the third bathroom with an updated vanity and a walk-in shower. The outdoor awaits! This stunning home has unobstructed views of the gorgeous lake. There is ample outdoor seating, a couch and chairs, a high-top table, Adirondack chairs, and plenty of chaise lounges. There will be a Clubhouse with a state-of-the-art fitness center, aerobics studio, splash park, a large resort style community pool, a playground, a sports court, basketball court, tennis courts, volleyball courts and much more.

Welcome to Precious Gem! This gorgeous fourth-floor 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo has unobstructed views of the lake and the golf course. Precious Gem is located in the highly sought-after community of Lakewood National, located in Lakewood Ranch, FL. This awe-inspiring community features a grand Amenity Center, a state-of-the-art fitness facility, a resort-style lagoon pool, poolside café, Tiki Bar, full-service spa, tennis courts, and more! There is a formal dining table with a stunning wood table that can accommodate up to four comfortably. Adjacent, you will find the extensive living room. There are two couches and an adjoining day chair, with views of the lake and the golf course right from the sofa! The kitchen has ample granite countertops and stainless steel appliances and is the perfect space to prepare your family's favorite meals. There is an informal dining room with amazing views of the lake and golf course, and it can accommodate up to four comfortably. The primary bedroom has a king-size bed and two dressers and is the perfect spot to relax after a long day by the pool! Attached is the primary bathroom, which has two walk-in closets, an updated vanity, and a giant walk-in shower tiled from floor to ceiling. The second bedroom has a queen-size bed, coastal décor, and plenty of closet space for your personal belongings. The second bathroom has a large vanity with a shower/tub combo. The outdoor retreat awaits! Being on the fourth floor is just an added perk to this condo. There are unobstructed views of the lake, golf course, and all the splendors of nature. There is outdoor seating for four, so be prepared to catch those stunning sunsets with your loved ones. Come, see why people return to Lakewood National year after year with their families and loved ones. The location is superb with only a 5-minute drive to downtown Lakewood Ranch, 20 minutes to downtown Sarasota and 40 minutes from Tampa. Not to mention that Lakewood National is only a short distance to Anna Maria Island, Siesta Key, restaurants, and shopping centers in the area. You’ll love everything about this community. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. No Pets. At the end of May, there will be a new Smart TV mounted in the living room and a TV mounted in the primary bedroom.

The kitchen has ample granite countertops and stainless steel appliances and is the perfect space to prepare your family's favorite meals. There is an informal dining room with amazing views of the lake and golf course, and it can accommodate up to four comfortably. The primary bedroom has a king-size bed and two dressers and is the perfect spot to relax after a long day by the pool! Attached is the primary bathroom, which has two walk-in closets, an updated vanity, and a giant walk-in shower tiled from floor to ceiling. The second bedroom has a queen-size bed, coastal décor, and plenty of closet space for your personal belongings. The second bathroom has a large vanity with a shower/tub combo. The outdoor retreat awaits! Being on the fourth floor is just an added perk to this condo. There are unobstructed views of the lake, golf course, and all the splendors of nature. There is outdoor seating for four, so be prepared to catch those stunning sunsets with your loved ones. Come, see why people return to Lakewood National year after year with their families and loved ones. The location is superb with only a 5-minute drive to downtown Lakewood Ranch, 20 minutes to downtown Sarasota and 40 minutes from Tampa. Not to mention that Lakewood National is only a short distance to Anna Maria Island, Siesta Key, restaurants, and shopping centers in the area. You’ll love everything about this community. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. No Pets. At the end of May, there will be a new Smart TV mounted in the living room and a TV mounted in the primary bedroom.

**Taxes and fees not included.

value.PublicRemarks:
Welcome to The Heatherwood Haven! This delightful two-story, 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhome is located in the stunning community of Heatherwood, a subdivision of The Meadows Golf and Country Club, which offers miles of private walking and biking trails, and tennis courts, a gym, three golf courses, lakes, and pools. Come, relish in the gorgeous Florida sunshine! Upon entering the home, you will find yourself lost in the gorgeous landscaping and the pure tranquility this home offers. You will find the first out of three outdoor patios through the screened-in front lanai. There is enough seating for up to two. When entering the home, you will find a light and bright atmosphere. The dining table overlooks the living room and can accommodate up to six comfortably. Adjacent is the kitchen, which has all stainless-steel appliances. The spacious living room boasts expansive windows overlooking the outdoor paradise. There are two plush couches and a Smart TV. The primary bedroom has a king-size bed, a dresser, a chair, and sliding glass doors leading out to a private screened-in patio. Attached is the primary bathroom, which has three closets, a dual vanity, and a shower/tub combo with a detachable showerhead. As you take the stairs to the second floor, you will find the remaining two bedrooms and bathroom, leaving this the perfect space for your loved ones on vacation. The second bedroom has two-twin size beds with plenty of dresser space. The second bathroom has a large vanity with a shower/tub combo. The third bedroom has loft vibes! One set of bunk beds, one twin-size bed and one full-size bed, a full-size futon, and plenty of closet space for your personal belongings. From the third bedroom, you have a gorgeous view of the downstairs living room and backyard space. Time for the outdoor paradise! You will find the third patio that has an outdoor dining set for four. The expansive backyard space is perfect for entertaining your family and loved ones. Just a walk through the backyard, and you will find two stunning lakes. Come, see why people return to The Meadows yearly, making memories that will last a lifetime. House Rule: No smoking. No burning candles inside of lodging. No parties. Sorry, no pets. The Meadows Country Club offers seasonal memberships, which can be purchased directly from the clubhouse. There are four different membership packages to choose from. Your home away from home is only a 30-minute drive from the silky majestic sands of award-winning Siesta Key Beach, and you will enjoy fabulous shopping, entertainment, theaters, and a plethora of fabulous restaurants in St. Armand's Circle, Sarasota, Lido Beach and Longboat Key.


**Taxes and fees not included.
